quantification.why: Nearly every comparison carries a computed figure — e.g., West "trailed at $1,414.82, roughly 35% below North" and Gadget's "$2,392.00 in revenue from only 16 units, reflecting its high unit price of $149.50."

specificity.why: Each recommendation names products, regions, and figures — "Investigate West's underperformance ($1,414.82 versus North's $2,176.35)" and "bundling low-priced Sprockets with Widgets to raise order values."

insight_density.why: It surfaces multiple non-obvious, actionable observations such as median ($204.94) vs. mean ($238.48) showing no dominant outlier, Gadget's high-price/low-volume revenue lead, and Sprocket's high-volume/low-revenue mismatch.

quantification.why: Nearly every comparison carries a computed figure — e.g. West 'roughly 35% below North', per-unit prices ($149.50, $4.75), and mean vs median ($238.48 vs $204.94).

specificity.why: Every recommendation names concrete products, regions, and figures, such as 'Investigate West's underperformance ($1,414.82 versus North's $2,176.35)' and bundling Sprockets with Widgets.

insight_density.why: It surfaces multiple non-obvious observations, including the price-volume inversion (Gadget's revenue from just 16 units vs Sprocket's 238 units at low revenue) and the North–West coverage gap.

quantification.why: Nearly every comparison carries a computed figure — unit prices ($149.50 vs $4.75), revenue-per-volume contrasts, and 'West trailed at $1,414.82, roughly 35% below North.'

specificity.why: Each recommendation names products, regions, and exact figures — 'Investigate West's underperformance ($1,414.82 versus North's $2,176.35)' and 'bundling low-priced Sprockets with Widgets.'

insight_density.why: Multiple non-obvious, actionable observations appear: Gadget's high price driving revenue on only 16 units, Sprocket's 238-unit volume yielding the lowest revenue at $4.75/unit, and the North–West coverage gap.
